message:
Pin WAL read snapshot at transaction begin to prevent visibility drift

Add read_snapshot_pinned and read_snapshot_last_commit fields to
WalBackendAdapter. When begin_transaction() is called, the current
last-commit-frame index is captured and frozen. Subsequent read_page()
calls use this pinned value instead of re-querying the WAL index,
preventing mid-transaction visibility drift where a reader could see
writes committed after its transaction began.

A new begin_transaction() call refreshes the snapshot. Includes test
validating that a reader does not see writes committed after its
transaction began.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
